name: Layered Shrimp Appetizer
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together the cream cheese and milk until smooth.
Then stir in the cheese, reserving 2 tablespoons for topping.
2. Spread the cream cheese mixture on the bottom of a 10-inch round serving dish,
spreading evenly with the cocktail sauce.
3. Top with shrimp, onions, and the reserved 2 tablespoons of cheese.
4. Cover; refrigerate at least 1 hour before serving.
5. Serve with crackers.
